# Marcus Reyes

Runs corp dev. M&A targets, partnerships, JVs. Different team than ours but we collaborate a lot — every M&A diligence ends up needing valuation work, and every valuation eventually triggers a "should we buy them" question.

## Working relationship

- bring him a thesis, not a target list. he wants the *why* before the *who*
- he's fast on commercial/strategic fit, slow on financial mechanics
- protective of CEO time — don't ask him to escalate without good reason
- treats himself as a customer for our work — useful posture

## Live tracks

- ~8 tuck-in precision targets in pipeline. low confidence on any single one closing 2026. see his pipeline note (not in this vault)
- [Globex outreach](../daily-notes/2026-05-09.md#back-to-acmes-side) — partnership lead, very early
- medical device adjacency for [Precision Components](../companies/acme-corp.md#precision-components-segment) — assessing
